overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic industrial district in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring the All Foods factory complex with towering electrical infrastructure, steam vents, and elevated roadways under a clear blue sky. The camera moves steadily through varying industrial environments from open elevated roads to shadowed underpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial roadway with large advertisement billboard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated roadway toward the large All Foods billboard ahead

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with clown mascot and All Foods branding
tall metal electrical transmission tower with multiple cross-arms
metal security fencing running along the left side of the road
industrial metal scaffolding structure with rusted orange-brown beams
red and white striped safety railings along the elevated road edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated industrial roadway under a clear blue sky, approaching a massive vertical billboard for All Foods. The path is flanked by chain-link fencing and a large electrical transmission tower looms on the left, while rusted scaffolding structures stand on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial approach with security gate and construction barriers

events.description: turns left at intersection with red and white construction barriers

agents.ego_description: navigating left turn around barriers toward the factory entrance gate

entered.detail: large decorative entry gate with All Foods signage and pig mascot
construction barriers with alternating red and white stripes
multi-story industrial building with green facade and external piping
tall white industrial smokestack emitting steam

segments.scene_description: Turning left at an intersection marked by red and white construction barriers, navigating toward the entrance of the All Foods factory complex. The large decorative archway of the gate becomes prominent ahead, with industrial green buildings and smokestacks visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial factory street with overhead pipes and steam vents

events.description: passes through All Foods security gate into factory complex interior

agents.ego_description: proceeding through industrial corridor with steam vents and overhead piping

notable_agents.action: red sedan parked along the curb near the industrial building

entered.detail: industrial bridge structure carrying large pipes across the street
tall pole with orange street light fixture
industrial vent emitting white steam clouds
tall gray concrete building with external fire escape stairs
yellow safety railing along the right sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Passing through the All Foods security gate into a narrow industrial corridor lined with overhead pipe bridges and steam vents. The green industrial building passes by on the left while walking along the asphalt street, passing a parked red sedan before approaching a large concrete overpass.

events.description: enters deep shadow under concrete overpass significantly reducing light
approaches intersection with red traffic light and waiting vehicles

agents.ego_description: moving through shadowed underpass toward traffic intersection with vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan waiting at red traffic light under the overpass
white car visible at the intersection ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge structure overhead creating deep shadow
tall transmission tower visible in the distance beyond the intersection
highway direction sign suspended over the road

segments.scene_description: Entering the shadowed area beneath a massive concrete overpass, significantly reducing ambient light. Approaching an intersection with a red traffic light where black and white vehicles are waiting, while distant electrical towers and industrial structures remain visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open elevated roadway into the shadowed depths of a massive industrial underpass. It begins by advancing along a sunlit path under a clear blue sky, passing a towering electrical transmission tower and a massive All Foods billboard. As the camera reaches an intersection marked by construction barriers, it turns left toward the All Foods factory complex, where a decorative archway and distant smokestacks come into view. The scene then shifts into a narrow industrial corridor, moving past overhead pipe bridges and steam vents beside a green building and a parked red sedan. Finally, the camera passes under a heavy concrete overpass, causing the light to dim significantly as it approaches a red traffic light and a line of waiting vehicles.
